name: Banana Muffins (from Triple Muffin Mix) - Lighter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the egg, oil and bananas.
2. Stir in the muffin mix until just combined.
3. Spoon the batter into greased muffin cups.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20 - 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
5. Allow to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing from the pan.
